# Productivity Skills

General workflow tools, not code-specific. Imported from [mattpocock/skills](https://github.com/mattpocock/skills).

- [caveman](caveman/SKILL.md) — Ultra-compressed communication mode. Cuts token usage ~75% by dropping filler while keeping full technical accuracy.
- [write-a-skill](write-a-skill/SKILL.md) — Create new agent skills with proper frontmatter, structure, and triggers.
